case_title: TRUONG, LE et al vs. HECK, JOHN et al

docket_entries.description: OSC CALENDAR OF OCT-10-1996, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CONTINUED FROM 10/10/96: IF NO PROOFS OF SERVICE FOR DEFTS. COURT SHALL DISMISS THE CASE. PLAINTIFFS ARE REQUIRED TO BE PRESENT AND IF NO PROOFS OF SERVICE PLAINTIFFS MUST FILE A DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE AS TO ALL ATTEMPTS MADE TO SERVE THE DEFTS.
